mapper.select: /* UserBookMapper.selectBookDtl */ SELECT AI_SEQ AS aiSeq ,HLI_SEQ AS hliSeq ,CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode ,CI_SEQ AS ciSeq ,INOUT_TYPE AS inoutType ,AMOUNT AS amount ,TRAN_DATE AS tranDate ,OVER_SPENDING_YN AS overSpendingYn ,REMARK AS remark ,REG_ID AS regId ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDt ,UPD_ID AS updId ,DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS updDt FROM TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND AI_SEQ = #{aiSeq} AND HLI_SEQ = #{hliSeq}
